wiki:analyses/2026-05-03-aoe2-water-and-.description: An AoE2 player should treat water maps and mixed maps as build-driven, execution-heavy map types, but adapt the focus differently.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-army-composition.description: Army composition refers to the selection and arrangement of different unit types to create an effective fighting force.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-build-orders.description: A build order is a sequence of actions that guides players to efficiently reach specific ages in the game.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-economy-balance.description: This balance of economy while producing and using your army is difficult to perfect.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-lanchesters-law.description: Lanchester's Law is a mathematical model that describes combat effectiveness in military contexts, which applies to unit interactions in Age of Empires II.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-map-awareness.description: Map awareness refers to a player's understanding of the current state of the map and the strategic implications of terrain and resource distribution.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-mixed-maps.description: Mixed maps in Age of Empires II combine water and land, so players must manage fish economy, land army, water control, and map-specific build orders at the same time.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-team-play-strategies.description: Team play strategies in Age of Empires II refer to coordinated tactics and approaches used by players working together in multiplayer matches.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-unit-counter-interact.description: Unit counter interactions refer to how different units in Age of Empires II interact with each other in combat, particularly in terms of which units can effectively counter others.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-water-maps.description: Water maps in Age of Empires II are maps such as Islands and Team Islands where water control, transports, fishing economy, landings, and build execution shape the game.

wiki:concepts/destructuring.description: Destructuring is a JavaScript syntax feature that allows extracting values from arrays or objects into distinct variables, making code more readable and concise.

wiki:procedures/aoe2-game-plans.description: A game plan in Age of Empires II is a strategic plan built from map generation, civilization power spikes, resource advantages, and the opponent's likely responses.

wiki:procedures/aoe2-scouting-techniques.description: Scouting in Age of Empires II is the process of using the scout and later map vision to identify resources, enemy activity, base layout, tech choices, and upgrades.
